arts.ttl: “Chance will come” | Hammers Academy star ready for chance
arts.sum: Having impressed during his scholarship with the Club, Josh Briggs has had to be patient for his chance with West Ham’s U21’s, but the young defender is now making his mark in the side. At U18 level, Briggs won the Premier League South as well as the FA Youth Cup. The youngster scored the Hammers... arts.ttl: Former Chelsea chief executive Marina Granovskaia wins High Court battle with agent over multi-million-pound dispute relating to Kurt Zouma's 2021 transfer to West Ham
arts.sum: Former Chelsea CEO Marina Granovskaia has welcomed the High Court's decision to rule in her favour in a legal battle with football agent Saif Alrubie.

arts.ttl: Three positive changes Graham Potter has implemented at West Ham
arts.sum: Following the painful period under Julen Lopetegui, West Ham fans might’ve expected more of the same under his replacement, Graham Potter. The former Brighton manager’s reputation had taken a hit after his time at Chelsea and he was somewhat of a forgotten man. Fast forward to today, though, and Potter has clearly mixed things up... arts.ttl: 'To be honest' - Ex-West Ham boss makes fresh admission on Tim Steidten

arts.ttl: Jarrad Branthwaite reveals new stadium ambition as David Moyes details talks after Everton snub

arts.ttl: West Ham United heading to US for Premier League Summer Series 2025 - tickets now on General Sale
arts.sum: It will be a huge honour to represent West Ham United in some amazing cities and at three iconic stadiums, in what will be a unique and exciting experience for everyone involved. We are really looking forward to meeting our supporters - as well as potential new Hammers fans and the people and communities of New Jersey, Chicago and Atlanta - and playing in front of them against Premier League opponents to prepare for the 2025/26 season.”
